subcodes.title: Words spoken in the house of 'Izzat Aqa
subcodes.first_line: Since We were well-known among all the ministers of Iran, they would all exhibit friendship towards Us
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما چون در میان وزرای ایران مشهور بودیم همه آنها با ما اظهار دوستی میکردند ولی خائف ازین بودند
subcodes.subjects: @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
